title: CQC dated inspection/report events for NHS acute trusts (extracted 2026-05-30)
vintage: CQC report history as held by the CQC API on 2026-05-30, for the NHS trust ODS codes appearing in the SHMI decision windows. One row per published CQC report event (provider_ods, provider_name, report_date, report_type).
notes: Used to define the fuzzy first-stage treatment: whether a trust received a CQC inspection in the period after being banded 'higher than expected'. The CQC public API requires a subscription key, so this canonical file was assembled once by scripts/cqc_extract.py (key read from a gitignored .cqc_api_key); the build reads the frozen file without a key. Not vendored into git: the bytes live in object storage / the local cache, pinned by sha256. Re-extraction needs a CQC API key and may differ as CQC updates.
